                        <h3 style="text-align: center;">What is the <strong>EHN Edgewood Rockies</strong> rehab facility like?</h3>
<p>On our 600-acre sanctuary nestled among Ktunaxa Nation lands, EHN Edgewood Rockies offers a private, welcoming environment surrounded by mountain air and natural beauty. Designed for rest, reflection, and renewal, it provides the structure and serenity essential for healing.</p>
<p>Here, you will have access to:</p>
<ul>
<li>Kilometres of walking, hiking, and mountain-biking trails</li>
<li>Forests of spruce and pine; guided group walks and hikes</li>
<li>Abundant local wildlife and panoramic mountain views</li>
<li>Fully equipped gym (weights + cardio)</li>
<li>Equine assisted learning</li>
<li>Infrared sauna</li>
<li>Yoga and meditation</li>
<li>Optional massage and reiki/reflexology (additional cost)</li>
</ul>

    <section class="faqs container">
        <div class="faqs-inner">
            <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
                       

            <div class="faqs-row no-header">
                
                <!-- Right column -->
                <div class="faqs-right schema-faq faq-list">
                    <ul>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What type of addictions are treated at EHN Edgewood Rockies? What if I have multiple addictive behaviours or concurrent mental health issues?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The dedicated clinical professionals at EHN Edgewood Rockies have designed a program that is both effective and specially tailored to address a diverse range of addiction challenges. Although we focus primarily on substance addictions (alcohol and drugs), our program can also address behavioural addictions such as gambling, sex and love addiction, as well as other dependencies.</p>
<p>Our program also recognizes that there are often concurrent mental health disorders that accompany addictions, such as depression, trauma, anxiety, and ADHD.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    How does EHN Edgewood Rockies determine the best treatment approach?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Upon admission, a full evaluation is conducted using a biopsychosocial interview. If necessary, additional follow-up screenings or assessment tools (e.g., the Addiction Severity Index, Substance Abuse Subtle Screening Inventory) are used to further guide our evaluation process.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What methods of treatment are used at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The intensive and comprehensive nature of our services sets EHN Edgewood Rockies apart.</p>
<p>Treatment is provided by fully trained professionals who work as a multidisciplinary team that follows a holistic approach. Because everyone experiences addiction differently, treatment is case-managed—each client is assigned a counsellor who ensures their specific recovery needs are met.</p>
<p>Our counsellors provide individual and group counselling, as well as psychoeducational sessions. Clients participate in seminars, classes on the nature of addiction, and complete self-reflective assignments. The program emphasizes relapse prevention, recovery strategies, balanced reintegration, and social support, while also encouraging engagement in work, physical activity, mindfulness, healthy eating, and appreciation for nature.</p>
<p>Evidence-based treatments and counselling techniques include:</p>
<ul>
<li>Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT)</li>
<li>Dialectical Behavioural Therapy (DBT)</li>
<li>Abstinence-based approach with medication assistance therapy (if needed)</li>
<li>Individual psychotherapy</li>
<li>Group therapy</li>
<li>Psychoeducational group sessions</li>
<li>Mindfulness and physical exercise</li>
<li>Relapse prevention groups</li>
</ul>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do you have a family program?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Our Family Education Workshops take place virtually and provide a safe space for loved ones to learn effective strategies for understanding, managing, and coping with chronic illnesses. These sessions share general information that family members can apply where relevant.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What is the weather like at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Located in the East Kootenay Valley, EHN Edgewood Rockies enjoys all four seasons with abundant sunshine. The region is relatively dry and sits at about 3,000 feet above sea level, offering mild winters, warm dry summers, and beautiful autumns and springs.</p>
<p>Each season brings unique charm—from cozy fireside reading in winter to blooming trails in spring and outdoor adventures year-round. The facility overlooks the Kimberley Alpine Ski Resort, and it’s even possible to ski and mountain bike in the same day.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do I need a referral to access this program?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>A referral is <strong>not required</strong>, but all potential clients must complete a comprehensive admissions application to ensure the program is the right fit. Intake staff may follow up for additional details or documentation, especially for clients with complex medical needs.</p>
<p>While a referral isn’t mandatory, we recommend obtaining one from a medical practitioner diagnosing addiction and recommending treatment or detox. This documentation is often useful for tax purposes. Upon discharge, EHN Edgewood Rockies provides receipts and a letter confirming attendance and costs.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    How secure is the facility?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The facility is secure and protected by its remote location, though it is <strong>not a locked facility</strong>. Clients may not leave the property unless accompanied by staff, and unauthorized visitors are not permitted. This ensures client safety and program integrity.</p>
<p>All personnel adhere to strict confidentiality policies. Patients may meet one another but must sign agreements to respect everyone’s privacy.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do patients need spending money?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>A $750 pre-payment covers extra services such as massage, reiki, or store purchases. Any additional charges will be billed to the credit card on file.</p>
<p>For off-site purchases or services, clients should bring their own spending money. Cash advances are available with a 3% transaction fee. Secure storage is provided for valuables such as wallets and keys.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do patients have a private room?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Accommodations include two-bedroom cabins and suites in the main lodge. While room assignments are made on a case-by-case basis, solo occupancy is discouraged to promote connection and reduce isolation. Suitemates may change during treatment.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Is drug testing done at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Blood and urine testing are part of the program. Patients must consent to random testing during treatment. The use of drugs or alcohol is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate dismissal.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Can patients take prescribed medication while in treatment?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>All medications must be pre-approved by an EHN Edgewood Rockies nurse in consultation with a physician. Medications are securely stored and administered under supervision. Clients may not personally possess any prescriptions, over-the-counter medications, herbal products, or supplements during treatment.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do patients have free time to themselves?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Clients are encouraged to engage in reflection, meditation, prayer, creative activities, exercise, or relaxation during designated free time.</p>
<p>The program structure is intentionally intensive yet balanced to provide the necessary support for healing, with opportunities for both personal time and social activities.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Is it a mixed-gender/co-ed program? Are there gender-specific sessions?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The program is inclusive and primarily co-ed, though certain group sessions are gender-specific for tailored support. Staff are sensitive to client comfort and maintain respectful boundaries.</p>
<p>EHN Edgewood Rockies intentionally mirrors real-world social environments to help clients transition successfully after treatment.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Should patients who don’t feel they have an addiction or were pressured into treatment enroll at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Clients should be ready and willing to participate in recovery. Those entering only to satisfy others or without commitment to the process may not benefit fully.</p>
<p>EHN Edgewood Rockies emphasizes compassion, respect, and evidence-based therapy—not confrontational or aversion-based methods. Individuals seeking more aggressive treatment approaches may be better served elsewhere.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What determines a loan approval?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Medicard, the financing provider, evaluates credit history, ability to pay, and employment status.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Can a patient apply with a co-signor?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. A co-signor can complete the relevant section of the Medicard application form and submit it by fax.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What if a patient applies for financing but decides to pay through other means?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>That’s perfectly fine. Simply notify the team of the preferred payment method.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Can a patient repay the loan before the end of the term?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Loans can be repaid early at any time without penalty.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                            </ul>
                </div>
            </div>





        </div>
    </section>

<script type="862140179d0ddd6408592410-text/javascript">
(function() {
    var dd = document.getElementById("search-dropdown");
    if (!dd) return;
    var inp = dd.querySelector("#search");

    function positionDD() {
        var candidates = [
            document.querySelector("header.desktop-menu nav.main-nav"),
            document.querySelector(".menu-main-menu-container"),
            document.querySelector("nav.main-nav"),
            document.querySelector("#main-nav-id"),
            document.querySelector(".menu-logo")
        ];
        for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
            var el = candidates[i];
            if (el) {
                var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.height > 0) {
                    dd.style.top = rect.bottom + "px";
                    return;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    function openS() {
        positionDD();
        dd.classList.add("open");
        if (inp) setTimeout(function(){ inp.focus(); }, 80);
    }
    function closeS() {
        dd.classList.remove("open");
    }
    function toggleS(e) {
        if (e) { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
        dd.classList.contains("open") ? closeS() : openS();
    }

    /* Remove old event listeners from .search-btn by cloning */
    document.querySelectorAll(".search-btn").forEach(function(el) {
        var clone = el.cloneNode(true);
        el.parentNode.replaceChild(clone, el);
        clone.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".mobile-search-btn").forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".ehn-search-toggle").forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    var esc = dd.querySelector(".search-esc");
    if (esc) esc.addEventListener("click", closeS);

    document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
        if (e.key === "Escape") closeS();
    });

    document.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
        if (!dd.classList.contains("open")) return;
        if (dd.contains(e.target)) return;
        if (e.target.closest(".search-btn, .mobile-search-btn, .ehn-search-toggle")) return;
        closeS();
    });
})();
</script>

 Home / Facilities / EHN Edgewood Rockies​ 

 

 

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies​

 

Evidence-Based Addiction & Mental Health Treatment in the Rocky Mountains 

 

 

 
 Call us 
 
 Inquiry Form 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies​

 

 
 8350 Holmes Rd, Fort Steele, BC, V0B 1N0, Canada 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 
 EHN Edgewood Rockies offers private, specialized addiction and mental health treatment in the heart of the Rocky Mountains . 

 Watch to find out how our serene, nature-filled environment and compassionate clinical team help individuals from across British Columbia and Canada find lasting recovery. 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies is one of British Columbia’s leading inpatient treatment centres 

EHN Edgewood Rockies combines world-class clinical care with the healing power of nature. As a private, medically supervised rehab centre in B.C., we offer personalized treatment for addiction and concurrent mental health disorders in a peaceful, natural setting.

We provide exceptional, evidence-based care through:

 

 Personalized Treatment Plans customized to meet the unique needs of each individual, ensuring effective and meaningful recovery outcomes.

 Innovative, Evidence-Based Rehab Treatments incorporating the latest advancements in mental health care to provide results-driven therapies.

 Canada’s Largest Network of Inpatient Mental Health Facilities with an extensive support system, offering a continuum of care across the country.

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
Find the right evidence-based treatment program for you.

 

What does evidence-based mean? It means we have the results to show that our programs work for our patients.

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
BC DRUG & ALCOHOL ADDICTION INPATIENT PROGRAM

 
 
 
An effective rehab treatment program that addresses the physical dependence and underlying mental health concerns that contribute to addiction.

 
 Click to Read More
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
BC HYBRID INPATIENT/ONLINE ADDICTION PROGRAM

 
 
 
Get convenience and stability with a combination of short inpatient stay followed by virtual outpatient treatment.

 
 Click to Read More
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
What is the EHN Edgewood Rockies rehab facility like?

On our 600-acre sanctuary nestled among Ktunaxa Nation lands, EHN Edgewood Rockies offers a private, welcoming environment surrounded by mountain air and natural beauty. Designed for rest, reflection, and renewal, it provides the structure and serenity essential for healing.

Here, you will have access to:

 

Kilometres of walking, hiking, and mountain-biking trails

Forests of spruce and pine; guided group walks and hikes

Abundant local wildlife and panoramic mountain views

Fully equipped gym (weights + cardio)

Equine assisted learning

Infrared sauna

Yoga and meditation

Optional massage and reiki/reflexology (additional cost)

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 The expert treatment you need for recovery from addiction or a mental health disorder. 

 
 

 
At EHN Edgewood Rockies​, we’re focused on understanding where you’re coming from and what you need as you work towards healing. Our evidence-based, compassionate approach is designed to support you through every step of the recovery journey. In fact, we’re the top choice for doctors who need treatment for themselves or loved ones.

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Exceptional Clinical Support 

We maintain a high clinician-to-patient ratio, ensuring personalized care through both group and one-on-one sessions.

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Specialized Mental Health Care 

Our mental health team, including on-site psychologists and Master’s level therapists, offers comprehensive support tailored to individual needs.

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Family-Focused Care 

Recovery is a shared journey, which is why we provide inclusive family programs to foster lasting healing and connection.

 Find out more. 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
What happens after you complete rehab and treatment at EHN Edgewood Rockies?

The end of treatment is only the beginning. But you will have plenty of support along the way. After rehab and treatment from EHN Edgewood Rockies​, you will have access to:

 

 Relapse Prevention Skills to help you navigate challenges and stay on track.

 1 Year of Aftercare to guide you as you transition back to daily life.

 Lifelong belonging in our EHN Canada Alumni Association , offering peer connections, events, and ongoing encouragement.

 

Your recovery journey continues with EHN Edgewood Rockies​’ lifelong support.

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
Meet the EHN Edgewood Rockies Team

 
From the moment you’re greeted upon your arrival and long after you walk out the doors, our passionate team of experts are here to help guide you through your recovery experience.

 
 
Here are just a few of the people who make it possible.

 

 

 
Ronald Lirette

 
Executive Director 

 

 

 
Jaime Jenkins

 
Clinical Director, BSW, MAPP, MSc

 

 

 
Dr. Andre Duguay

 
Physician, MD

 

 

 
Dr. Tim Ayas

 
Psychiatrist

 

 

 
 

 

 
 Meet the entire team
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Frequently Asked Questions

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 What type of addictions are treated at EHN Edgewood Rockies? What if I have multiple addictive behaviours or concurrent mental health issues? 

 

 
The dedicated clinical professionals at EHN Edgewood Rockies have designed a program that is both effective and specially tailored to address a diverse range of addiction challenges. Although we focus primarily on substance addictions (alcohol and drugs), our program can also address behavioural addictions such as gambling, sex and love addiction, as well as other dependencies.

Our program also recognizes that there are often concurrent mental health disorders that accompany addictions, such as depression, trauma, anxiety, and ADHD.

 

 

 

 

 How does EHN Edgewood Rockies determine the best treatment approach? 

 

 
Upon admission, a full evaluation is conducted using a biopsychosocial interview. If necessary, additional follow-up screenings or assessment tools (e.g., the Addiction Severity Index, Substance Abuse Subtle Screening Inventory) are used to further guide our evaluation process.

 

 

 

 

 What methods of treatment are used at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
The intensive and comprehensive nature of our services sets EHN Edgewood Rockies apart.

Treatment is provided by fully trained professionals who work as a multidisciplinary team that follows a holistic approach. Because everyone experiences addiction differently, treatment is case-managed—each client is assigned a counsellor who ensures their specific recovery needs are met.

Our counsellors provide individual and group counselling, as well as psychoeducational sessions. Clients participate in seminars, classes on the nature of addiction, and complete self-reflective assignments. The program emphasizes relapse prevention, recovery strategies, balanced reintegration, and social support, while also encouraging engagement in work, physical activity, mindfulness, healthy eating, and appreciation for nature.

Evidence-based treatments and counselling techniques include:

 

Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT)

Dialectical Behavioural Therapy (DBT)

Abstinence-based approach with medication assistance therapy (if needed)

Individual psychotherapy

Group therapy

Psychoeducational group sessions

Mindfulness and physical exercise

Relapse prevention groups

 
 

 

 

 

 Do you have a family program? 

 

 
Yes. Our Family Education Workshops take place virtually and provide a safe space for loved ones to learn effective strategies for understanding, managing, and coping with chronic illnesses. These sessions share general information that family members can apply where relevant.

 

 

 

 

 What is the weather like at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
Located in the East Kootenay Valley, EHN Edgewood Rockies enjoys all four seasons with abundant sunshine. The region is relatively dry and sits at about 3,000 feet above sea level, offering mild winters, warm dry summers, and beautiful autumns and springs.

Each season brings unique charm—from cozy fireside reading in winter to blooming trails in spring and outdoor adventures year-round. The facility overlooks the Kimberley Alpine Ski Resort, and it’s even possible to ski and mountain bike in the same day.

 

 

 

 

 Do I need a referral to access this program? 

 

 
A referral is not required , but all potential clients must complete a comprehensive admissions application to ensure the program is the right fit. Intake staff may follow up for additional details or documentation, especially for clients with complex medical needs.

While a referral isn’t mandatory, we recommend obtaining one from a medical practitioner diagnosing addiction and recommending treatment or detox. This documentation is often useful for tax purposes. Upon discharge, EHN Edgewood Rockies provides receipts and a letter confirming attendance and costs.

 

 

 

 

 How secure is the facility? 

 

 
The facility is secure and protected by its remote location, though it is not a locked facility . Clients may not leave the property unless accompanied by staff, and unauthorized visitors are not permitted. This ensures client safety and program integrity.

All personnel adhere to strict confidentiality policies. Patients may meet one another but must sign agreements to respect everyone’s privacy.

 

 

 

 

 Do patients need spending money? 

 

 
A $750 pre-payment covers extra services such as massage, reiki, or store purchases. Any additional charges will be billed to the credit card on file.

For off-site purchases or services, clients should bring their own spending money. Cash advances are available with a 3% transaction fee. Secure storage is provided for valuables such as wallets and keys.

 

 

 

 

 Do patients have a private room? 

 

 
Accommodations include two-bedroom cabins and suites in the main lodge. While room assignments are made on a case-by-case basis, solo occupancy is discouraged to promote connection and reduce isolation. Suitemates may change during treatment.

 

 

 

 

 Is drug testing done at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
Yes. Blood and urine testing are part of the program. Patients must consent to random testing during treatment. The use of drugs or alcohol is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate dismissal.

 

 

 

 

 Can patients take prescribed medication while in treatment? 

 

 
All medications must be pre-approved by an EHN Edgewood Rockies nurse in consultation with a physician. Medications are securely stored and administered under supervision. Clients may not personally possess any prescriptions, over-the-counter medications, herbal products, or supplements during treatment.

 

 

 

 

 Do patients have free time to themselves? 

 

 
Yes. Clients are encouraged to engage in reflection, meditation, prayer, creative activities, exercise, or relaxation during designated free time.

The program structure is intentionally intensive yet balanced to provide the necessary support for healing, with opportunities for both personal time and social activities.

 

 

 

 

 Is it a mixed-gender/co-ed program? Are there gender-specific sessions? 

 

 
The program is inclusive and primarily co-ed, though certain group sessions are gender-specific for tailored support. Staff are sensitive to client comfort and maintain respectful boundaries.

EHN Edgewood Rockies intentionally mirrors real-world social environments to help clients transition successfully after treatment.

 

 

 

 

 Should patients who don’t feel they have an addiction or were pressured into treatment enroll at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
Clients should be ready and willing to participate in recovery. Those entering only to satisfy others or without commitment to the process may not benefit fully.

EHN Edgewood Rockies emphasizes compassion, respect, and evidence-based therapy—not confrontational or aversion-based methods. Individuals seeking more aggressive treatment approaches may be better served elsewhere.

 

 

 

 

 What determines a loan approval? 

 

 
Medicard, the financing provider, evaluates credit history, ability to pay, and employment status.

 

 

 

 

 Can a patient apply with a co-signor? 

 

 
Yes. A co-signor can complete the relevant section of the Medicard application form and submit it by fax.

 

 

 

 

 What if a patient applies for financing but decides to pay through other means? 

 

 
That’s perfectly fine. Simply notify the team of the preferred payment method.

 

 

 

 

 Can a patient repay the loan before the end of the term? 

 

 
Yes. Loans can be repaid early at any time without penalty.

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
LOCATION

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies

 

8350 Holmes Rd, Fort Steele, BC, V0B 1N0, Canada 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 

 

 
READY TO BEGIN YOUR RECOVERY JOURNEY?

                        <h3 style="text-align: center;">What is the <strong>EHN Edgewood Rockies</strong> rehab facility like?</h3>
<p>On our 600-acre sanctuary nestled among Ktunaxa Nation lands, EHN Edgewood Rockies offers a private, welcoming environment surrounded by mountain air and natural beauty. Designed for rest, reflection, and renewal, it provides the structure and serenity essential for healing.</p>
<p>Here, you will have access to:</p>
<ul>
<li>Kilometres of walking, hiking, and mountain-biking trails</li>
<li>Forests of spruce and pine; guided group walks and hikes</li>
<li>Abundant local wildlife and panoramic mountain views</li>
<li>Fully equipped gym (weights + cardio)</li>
<li>Equine assisted learning</li>
<li>Infrared sauna</li>
<li>Yoga and meditation</li>
<li>Optional massage and reiki/reflexology (additional cost)</li>
</ul>

    <section class="faqs container">
        <div class="faqs-inner">
            <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
                       

            <div class="faqs-row no-header">
                
                <!-- Right column -->
                <div class="faqs-right schema-faq faq-list">
                    <ul>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What type of addictions are treated at EHN Edgewood Rockies? What if I have multiple addictive behaviours or concurrent mental health issues?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The dedicated clinical professionals at EHN Edgewood Rockies have designed a program that is both effective and specially tailored to address a diverse range of addiction challenges. Although we focus primarily on substance addictions (alcohol and drugs), our program can also address behavioural addictions such as gambling, sex and love addiction, as well as other dependencies.</p>
<p>Our program also recognizes that there are often concurrent mental health disorders that accompany addictions, such as depression, trauma, anxiety, and ADHD.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    How does EHN Edgewood Rockies determine the best treatment approach?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Upon admission, a full evaluation is conducted using a biopsychosocial interview. If necessary, additional follow-up screenings or assessment tools (e.g., the Addiction Severity Index, Substance Abuse Subtle Screening Inventory) are used to further guide our evaluation process.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What methods of treatment are used at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The intensive and comprehensive nature of our services sets EHN Edgewood Rockies apart.</p>
<p>Treatment is provided by fully trained professionals who work as a multidisciplinary team that follows a holistic approach. Because everyone experiences addiction differently, treatment is case-managed—each client is assigned a counsellor who ensures their specific recovery needs are met.</p>
<p>Our counsellors provide individual and group counselling, as well as psychoeducational sessions. Clients participate in seminars, classes on the nature of addiction, and complete self-reflective assignments. The program emphasizes relapse prevention, recovery strategies, balanced reintegration, and social support, while also encouraging engagement in work, physical activity, mindfulness, healthy eating, and appreciation for nature.</p>
<p>Evidence-based treatments and counselling techniques include:</p>
<ul>
<li>Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT)</li>
<li>Dialectical Behavioural Therapy (DBT)</li>
<li>Abstinence-based approach with medication assistance therapy (if needed)</li>
<li>Individual psychotherapy</li>
<li>Group therapy</li>
<li>Psychoeducational group sessions</li>
<li>Mindfulness and physical exercise</li>
<li>Relapse prevention groups</li>
</ul>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do you have a family program?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Our Family Education Workshops take place virtually and provide a safe space for loved ones to learn effective strategies for understanding, managing, and coping with chronic illnesses. These sessions share general information that family members can apply where relevant.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What is the weather like at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Located in the East Kootenay Valley, EHN Edgewood Rockies enjoys all four seasons with abundant sunshine. The region is relatively dry and sits at about 3,000 feet above sea level, offering mild winters, warm dry summers, and beautiful autumns and springs.</p>
<p>Each season brings unique charm—from cozy fireside reading in winter to blooming trails in spring and outdoor adventures year-round. The facility overlooks the Kimberley Alpine Ski Resort, and it’s even possible to ski and mountain bike in the same day.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do I need a referral to access this program?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>A referral is <strong>not required</strong>, but all potential clients must complete a comprehensive admissions application to ensure the program is the right fit. Intake staff may follow up for additional details or documentation, especially for clients with complex medical needs.</p>
<p>While a referral isn’t mandatory, we recommend obtaining one from a medical practitioner diagnosing addiction and recommending treatment or detox. This documentation is often useful for tax purposes. Upon discharge, EHN Edgewood Rockies provides receipts and a letter confirming attendance and costs.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    How secure is the facility?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The facility is secure and protected by its remote location, though it is <strong>not a locked facility</strong>. Clients may not leave the property unless accompanied by staff, and unauthorized visitors are not permitted. This ensures client safety and program integrity.</p>
<p>All personnel adhere to strict confidentiality policies. Patients may meet one another but must sign agreements to respect everyone’s privacy.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do patients need spending money?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>A $750 pre-payment covers extra services such as massage, reiki, or store purchases. Any additional charges will be billed to the credit card on file.</p>
<p>For off-site purchases or services, clients should bring their own spending money. Cash advances are available with a 3% transaction fee. Secure storage is provided for valuables such as wallets and keys.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do patients have a private room?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Accommodations include two-bedroom cabins and suites in the main lodge. While room assignments are made on a case-by-case basis, solo occupancy is discouraged to promote connection and reduce isolation. Suitemates may change during treatment.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Is drug testing done at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Blood and urine testing are part of the program. Patients must consent to random testing during treatment. The use of drugs or alcohol is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate dismissal.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Can patients take prescribed medication while in treatment?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>All medications must be pre-approved by an EHN Edgewood Rockies nurse in consultation with a physician. Medications are securely stored and administered under supervision. Clients may not personally possess any prescriptions, over-the-counter medications, herbal products, or supplements during treatment.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Do patients have free time to themselves?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Clients are encouraged to engage in reflection, meditation, prayer, creative activities, exercise, or relaxation during designated free time.</p>
<p>The program structure is intentionally intensive yet balanced to provide the necessary support for healing, with opportunities for both personal time and social activities.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Is it a mixed-gender/co-ed program? Are there gender-specific sessions?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>The program is inclusive and primarily co-ed, though certain group sessions are gender-specific for tailored support. Staff are sensitive to client comfort and maintain respectful boundaries.</p>
<p>EHN Edgewood Rockies intentionally mirrors real-world social environments to help clients transition successfully after treatment.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Should patients who don’t feel they have an addiction or were pressured into treatment enroll at EHN Edgewood Rockies?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Clients should be ready and willing to participate in recovery. Those entering only to satisfy others or without commitment to the process may not benefit fully.</p>
<p>EHN Edgewood Rockies emphasizes compassion, respect, and evidence-based therapy—not confrontational or aversion-based methods. Individuals seeking more aggressive treatment approaches may be better served elsewhere.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What determines a loan approval?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Medicard, the financing provider, evaluates credit history, ability to pay, and employment status.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Can a patient apply with a co-signor?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. A co-signor can complete the relevant section of the Medicard application form and submit it by fax.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    What if a patient applies for financing but decides to pay through other means?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>That’s perfectly fine. Simply notify the team of the preferred payment method.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                                    <li class="schema-faq-section">
                                <div class="schema-faq-question">
                                    Can a patient repay the loan before the end of the term?                                </div>
                                <div class="schema-faq-answer">
                                    <p>Yes. Loans can be repaid early at any time without penalty.</p>
                                </div>
                            </li>
                                            </ul>
                </div>
            </div>





        </div>
    </section>

			var top  = ( window.innerHeight / 2 )-( h / 2 );
			return window.open(url, title, 'toolbar=no, location=no, directories=no, status=no, menubar=no, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, copyhistory=no, width=600, height=600, top='+top+', left='+left);
		}
	</script>

<script type="ce3ec5ba893486f9fee10789-text/javascript">
(function() {
    var dd = document.getElementById("search-dropdown");
    if (!dd) return;
    var inp = dd.querySelector("#search");

    function positionDD() {
        var candidates = [
            document.querySelector("header.desktop-menu nav.main-nav"),
            document.querySelector(".menu-main-menu-container"),
            document.querySelector("nav.main-nav"),
            document.querySelector("#main-nav-id"),
            document.querySelector(".menu-logo")
        ];
        for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
            var el = candidates[i];
            if (el) {
                var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.height > 0) {
                    dd.style.top = rect.bottom + "px";
                    return;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    function openS() {
        positionDD();
        dd.classList.add("open");
        if (inp) setTimeout(function(){ inp.focus(); }, 80);
    }
    function closeS() {
        dd.classList.remove("open");
    }
    function toggleS(e) {
        if (e) { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
        dd.classList.contains("open") ? closeS() : openS();
    }

    /* Remove old event listeners from .search-btn by cloning */
    document.querySelectorAll(".search-btn").forEach(function(el) {
        var clone = el.cloneNode(true);
        el.parentNode.replaceChild(clone, el);
        clone.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".mobile-search-btn").forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".ehn-search-toggle").forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    var esc = dd.querySelector(".search-esc");
    if (esc) esc.addEventListener("click", closeS);

    document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
        if (e.key === "Escape") closeS();
    });

    document.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
        if (!dd.classList.contains("open")) return;
        if (dd.contains(e.target)) return;
        if (e.target.closest(".search-btn, .mobile-search-btn, .ehn-search-toggle")) return;
        closeS();
    });
})();
</script>

Get Help Now

 
Whether you’re ready to start your journey with EHN Canada now or just want to learn more, our admissions counsellors can guide you through your options.

Have more questions about our programs?

 Make a referral 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 No thank you, not at this time. 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
Receive the Latest from EHN Canada

 ESC 
 

 
 Return To Top 
 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Home / Facilities / EHN Edgewood Rockies​ 

 

 

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies​

 

Evidence-Based Addiction & Mental Health Treatment in the Rocky Mountains 

 

 

 
 Call us 
 
 Inquiry Form 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies​

 

 
 8350 Holmes Rd, Fort Steele, BC, V0B 1N0, Canada 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 
 EHN Edgewood Rockies offers private, specialized addiction and mental health treatment in the heart of the Rocky Mountains . 

 Watch to find out how our serene, nature-filled environment and compassionate clinical team help individuals from across British Columbia and Canada find lasting recovery. 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies is one of British Columbia’s leading inpatient treatment centres 

EHN Edgewood Rockies combines world-class clinical care with the healing power of nature. As a private, medically supervised rehab centre in B.C., we offer personalized treatment for addiction and concurrent mental health disorders in a peaceful, natural setting.

We provide exceptional, evidence-based care through:

 

 Personalized Treatment Plans customized to meet the unique needs of each individual, ensuring effective and meaningful recovery outcomes.

 Innovative, Evidence-Based Rehab Treatments incorporating the latest advancements in mental health care to provide results-driven therapies.

 Canada’s Largest Network of Inpatient Mental Health Facilities with an extensive support system, offering a continuum of care across the country.

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
Find the right evidence-based treatment program for you.

 

What does evidence-based mean? It means we have the results to show that our programs work for our patients.

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
BC DRUG & ALCOHOL ADDICTION INPATIENT PROGRAM

 
 
 
An effective rehab treatment program that addresses the physical dependence and underlying mental health concerns that contribute to addiction.

 
 Click to Read More
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
BC HYBRID INPATIENT/ONLINE ADDICTION PROGRAM

 
 
 
Get convenience and stability with a combination of short inpatient stay followed by virtual outpatient treatment.

 
 Click to Read More
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
What is the EHN Edgewood Rockies rehab facility like?

On our 600-acre sanctuary nestled among Ktunaxa Nation lands, EHN Edgewood Rockies offers a private, welcoming environment surrounded by mountain air and natural beauty. Designed for rest, reflection, and renewal, it provides the structure and serenity essential for healing.

Here, you will have access to:

 

Kilometres of walking, hiking, and mountain-biking trails

Forests of spruce and pine; guided group walks and hikes

Abundant local wildlife and panoramic mountain views

Fully equipped gym (weights + cardio)

Equine assisted learning

Infrared sauna

Yoga and meditation

Optional massage and reiki/reflexology (additional cost)

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 The expert treatment you need for recovery from addiction or a mental health disorder. 

 
 

 
At EHN Edgewood Rockies​, we’re focused on understanding where you’re coming from and what you need as you work towards healing. Our evidence-based, compassionate approach is designed to support you through every step of the recovery journey. In fact, we’re the top choice for doctors who need treatment for themselves or loved ones.

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Exceptional Clinical Support 

We maintain a high clinician-to-patient ratio, ensuring personalized care through both group and one-on-one sessions.

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Specialized Mental Health Care 

Our mental health team, including on-site psychologists and Master’s level therapists, offers comprehensive support tailored to individual needs.

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Family-Focused Care 

Recovery is a shared journey, which is why we provide inclusive family programs to foster lasting healing and connection.

 Find out more. 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
What happens after you complete rehab and treatment at EHN Edgewood Rockies?

The end of treatment is only the beginning. But you will have plenty of support along the way. After rehab and treatment from EHN Edgewood Rockies​, you will have access to:

 

 Relapse Prevention Skills to help you navigate challenges and stay on track.

 1 Year of Aftercare to guide you as you transition back to daily life.

 Lifelong belonging in our EHN Canada Alumni Association , offering peer connections, events, and ongoing encouragement.

 

Your recovery journey continues with EHN Edgewood Rockies​’ lifelong support.

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
Meet the EHN Edgewood Rockies Team

 
From the moment you’re greeted upon your arrival and long after you walk out the doors, our passionate team of experts are here to help guide you through your recovery experience.

 
 
Here are just a few of the people who make it possible.

 

 

 
Ronald Lirette

 
Executive Director 

 

 

 
Jaime Jenkins

 
Clinical Director, BSW, MAPP, MSc

 

 

 
Dr. Andre Duguay

 
Physician, MD

 

 

 
Dr. Tim Ayas

 
Psychiatrist

 

 

 
 

 

 
 Meet the entire team
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Frequently Asked Questions

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 What type of addictions are treated at EHN Edgewood Rockies? What if I have multiple addictive behaviours or concurrent mental health issues? 

 

 
The dedicated clinical professionals at EHN Edgewood Rockies have designed a program that is both effective and specially tailored to address a diverse range of addiction challenges. Although we focus primarily on substance addictions (alcohol and drugs), our program can also address behavioural addictions such as gambling, sex and love addiction, as well as other dependencies.

Our program also recognizes that there are often concurrent mental health disorders that accompany addictions, such as depression, trauma, anxiety, and ADHD.

 

 

 

 

 How does EHN Edgewood Rockies determine the best treatment approach? 

 

 
Upon admission, a full evaluation is conducted using a biopsychosocial interview. If necessary, additional follow-up screenings or assessment tools (e.g., the Addiction Severity Index, Substance Abuse Subtle Screening Inventory) are used to further guide our evaluation process.

 

 

 

 

 What methods of treatment are used at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
The intensive and comprehensive nature of our services sets EHN Edgewood Rockies apart.

Treatment is provided by fully trained professionals who work as a multidisciplinary team that follows a holistic approach. Because everyone experiences addiction differently, treatment is case-managed—each client is assigned a counsellor who ensures their specific recovery needs are met.

Our counsellors provide individual and group counselling, as well as psychoeducational sessions. Clients participate in seminars, classes on the nature of addiction, and complete self-reflective assignments. The program emphasizes relapse prevention, recovery strategies, balanced reintegration, and social support, while also encouraging engagement in work, physical activity, mindfulness, healthy eating, and appreciation for nature.

Evidence-based treatments and counselling techniques include:

 

Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT)

Dialectical Behavioural Therapy (DBT)

Abstinence-based approach with medication assistance therapy (if needed)

Individual psychotherapy

Group therapy

Psychoeducational group sessions

Mindfulness and physical exercise

Relapse prevention groups

 
 

 

 

 

 Do you have a family program? 

 

 
Yes. Our Family Education Workshops take place virtually and provide a safe space for loved ones to learn effective strategies for understanding, managing, and coping with chronic illnesses. These sessions share general information that family members can apply where relevant.

 

 

 

 

 What is the weather like at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
Located in the East Kootenay Valley, EHN Edgewood Rockies enjoys all four seasons with abundant sunshine. The region is relatively dry and sits at about 3,000 feet above sea level, offering mild winters, warm dry summers, and beautiful autumns and springs.

Each season brings unique charm—from cozy fireside reading in winter to blooming trails in spring and outdoor adventures year-round. The facility overlooks the Kimberley Alpine Ski Resort, and it’s even possible to ski and mountain bike in the same day.

 

 

 

 

 Do I need a referral to access this program? 

 

 
A referral is not required , but all potential clients must complete a comprehensive admissions application to ensure the program is the right fit. Intake staff may follow up for additional details or documentation, especially for clients with complex medical needs.

While a referral isn’t mandatory, we recommend obtaining one from a medical practitioner diagnosing addiction and recommending treatment or detox. This documentation is often useful for tax purposes. Upon discharge, EHN Edgewood Rockies provides receipts and a letter confirming attendance and costs.

 

 

 

 

 How secure is the facility? 

 

 
The facility is secure and protected by its remote location, though it is not a locked facility . Clients may not leave the property unless accompanied by staff, and unauthorized visitors are not permitted. This ensures client safety and program integrity.

All personnel adhere to strict confidentiality policies. Patients may meet one another but must sign agreements to respect everyone’s privacy.

 

 

 

 

 Do patients need spending money? 

 

 
A $750 pre-payment covers extra services such as massage, reiki, or store purchases. Any additional charges will be billed to the credit card on file.

For off-site purchases or services, clients should bring their own spending money. Cash advances are available with a 3% transaction fee. Secure storage is provided for valuables such as wallets and keys.

 

 

 

 

 Do patients have a private room? 

 

 
Accommodations include two-bedroom cabins and suites in the main lodge. While room assignments are made on a case-by-case basis, solo occupancy is discouraged to promote connection and reduce isolation. Suitemates may change during treatment.

 

 

 

 

 Is drug testing done at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
Yes. Blood and urine testing are part of the program. Patients must consent to random testing during treatment. The use of drugs or alcohol is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate dismissal.

 

 

 

 

 Can patients take prescribed medication while in treatment? 

 

 
All medications must be pre-approved by an EHN Edgewood Rockies nurse in consultation with a physician. Medications are securely stored and administered under supervision. Clients may not personally possess any prescriptions, over-the-counter medications, herbal products, or supplements during treatment.

 

 

 

 

 Do patients have free time to themselves? 

 

 
Yes. Clients are encouraged to engage in reflection, meditation, prayer, creative activities, exercise, or relaxation during designated free time.

The program structure is intentionally intensive yet balanced to provide the necessary support for healing, with opportunities for both personal time and social activities.

 

 

 

 

 Is it a mixed-gender/co-ed program? Are there gender-specific sessions? 

 

 
The program is inclusive and primarily co-ed, though certain group sessions are gender-specific for tailored support. Staff are sensitive to client comfort and maintain respectful boundaries.

EHN Edgewood Rockies intentionally mirrors real-world social environments to help clients transition successfully after treatment.

 

 

 

 

 Should patients who don’t feel they have an addiction or were pressured into treatment enroll at EHN Edgewood Rockies? 

 

 
Clients should be ready and willing to participate in recovery. Those entering only to satisfy others or without commitment to the process may not benefit fully.

EHN Edgewood Rockies emphasizes compassion, respect, and evidence-based therapy—not confrontational or aversion-based methods. Individuals seeking more aggressive treatment approaches may be better served elsewhere.

 

 

 

 

 What determines a loan approval? 

 

 
Medicard, the financing provider, evaluates credit history, ability to pay, and employment status.

 

 

 

 

 Can a patient apply with a co-signor? 

 

 
Yes. A co-signor can complete the relevant section of the Medicard application form and submit it by fax.

 

 

 

 

 What if a patient applies for financing but decides to pay through other means? 

 

 
That’s perfectly fine. Simply notify the team of the preferred payment method.

 

 

 

 

 Can a patient repay the loan before the end of the term? 

 

 
Yes. Loans can be repaid early at any time without penalty.

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
LOCATION

 
EHN Edgewood Rockies

 

8350 Holmes Rd, Fort Steele, BC, V0B 1N0, Canada 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 

 

 
READY TO BEGIN YOUR RECOVERY JOURNEY?

<script type="cce0cefe0f213d836cff8b4b-text/javascript">
(function() {
    var dd = document.getElementById("search-dropdown");
    if (!dd) return;
    var inp = dd.querySelector("#search");

    function positionDD() {
        var candidates = [
            document.querySelector("header.desktop-menu nav.main-nav"),
            document.querySelector(".menu-main-menu-container"),
            document.querySelector("nav.main-nav"),
            document.querySelector("#main-nav-id"),
            document.querySelector(".menu-logo")
        ];
        for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
            var el = candidates[i];
            if (el) {
                var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (rect.height > 0) {
                    dd.style.top = rect.bottom + "px";
                    return;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    function openS() {
        positionDD();
        dd.classList.add("open");
        if (inp) setTimeout(function(){ inp.focus(); }, 80);
    }
    function closeS() {
        dd.classList.remove("open");
    }
    function toggleS(e) {
        if (e) { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
        dd.classList.contains("open") ? closeS() : openS();
    }

    /* Remove old event listeners from .search-btn by cloning */
    document.querySelectorAll(".search-btn").forEach(function(el) {
        var clone = el.cloneNode(true);
        el.parentNode.replaceChild(clone, el);
        clone.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".mobile-search-btn").forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".ehn-search-toggle").forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener("click", toggleS);
    });

    var esc = dd.querySelector(".search-esc");
    if (esc) esc.addEventListener("click", closeS);

    document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
        if (e.key === "Escape") closeS();
    });

    document.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
        if (!dd.classList.contains("open")) return;
        if (dd.contains(e.target)) return;
        if (e.target.closest(".search-btn, .mobile-search-btn, .ehn-search-toggle")) return;
        closeS();
    });
})();
</script>
